items.channel_label: Sandy Lee AI — AI sales automation, systems thinking
items.title: I Used Claude MCP to Make AI UGC Ads and Make Money in 2026
items.description:
🔗 Try Arcads: https://arcads.ai/?via=sandyleeai
🔗 Join Private Community: https://www.skool.com/sandyleeai
🔗 Free Resources: https://sleeautomation.com/resources

Want to make money online with AI UGC ads but don't know where to start? In this video, I walk you through the exact workflow I use to create AI-generated UGC ad videos using Arcads MCP + Claude no platform learning curve, no expensive creator fees. You'll see everything live from research to a finished video.

You'll learn how to use Claude as your script writer, actor selector, and video generator all in one place. I'll show you how to find real job opportunities for this skill, how to set up Arcads MCP in Claude, and how to go from a product brief to a publishable ad including a live walkthrough using a real hat brand as an example.

This is a skill with real earning potential. If you can prompt AI well and deliver results for brands, you can charge for it whether as a freelancer, agency owner, or in-house creative. Drop "meta" in the comments if you want to see how to connect this workflow directly to Facebook ads.

Timestamps:
0:00 Why AI video is the skill to learn in 2026
1:05 Where to find UGC ad jobs right now
2:42 Setting up Arcads + the product brief
3:05 Connecting Arcads MCP to Claude
7:05 Running market research with Claude
9:09 Writing the UGC script with Claude
11:15 Selecting a voice and generating an AI actor
14:16 Creating the video with Seedance 2.0
15:28 Reviewing the finished ad
16:30 How to connect Meta ads to Claude

items.title: Same Sales Velocity, But LTV Is 5-10x Higher
items.description:
Who you sell to matters as much (or more than) the value you provide:

If you help a billionaire lose weight you can charge 100x more than gen pop. 

Because in a very real way, that more narrowly defined market values the solution at a higher dollar amount.

items.title: Codex Can Now "Copy" Your Tasks
items.description:
Codex can now watch your screen, learn what repetitive tasks you need done, and then do them for you.

OpenAI just dropped a new feature called "Record and Replay" and it’s the ultimate cheat code for repetitive tasks.

First, you record yourself doing a task once and the AI will watch your screen, understand your clicks, and turn that task into a brand-new "skill" that it saves. Then, the next time you need to do this task, just drop whatever context you need into the chat box and tell it to use the skill it saved.

What is the FIRST repetitive task you would let this AI copy for you? Let me know in the comments👇

#OpenAI #AI #ProductivityHacks #AInews #chatgpt

items.channel_label: Nate Herk — n8n + Claude Code, selling automation
items.title: I Battle Tested Sakana Fugu's Fable Killer
items.description:
My FREE AI OS Course: https://www.skool.com/ai-automation-society/about?el=sakana-fugu-test&hcategory=youtube-videos&utm_campaign=free-group
Full courses + unlimited support: https://www.skool.com/ai-automation-society-plus/about?el=sakana-fugu-test&hcategory=youtube-videos&utm_campaign=ais-plus
Apply for my YT podcast: https://podcast.nateherk.com/apply
Work with me: https://uppitai.com/

My Tools💻
FREE MONTH voice to text: https://get.glaido.com/nate
Code NATEHERK for 10% off VPS (annual plan): https://www.hostinger.com/vps/claude-code-hosting

Sakana dropped Fugu Ultra and the announcement went viral claiming it matches Fable and Mythos. Fugu isn't a new model. It's one API that orchestrates and routes tasks across frontier models like Opus, GPT, and Gemini, kind of like Claude Code spinning up sub-agents, just automatic.

So I ran Fugu Ultra against Claude Opus 4.8 across 38 tasks to see if the orchestration actually wins. In this video you'll see where it landed on quality, speed, and cost, and why I'm not switching off my Claude Code and Codex subscriptions yet.

Sponsorship Inquiries:
📧 nate@smoothmedia.co

Connect with me:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/nateherkelman/
https://x.com/nateherk
https://www.instagram.com/nateherk/

3:30 The Orchestration Spectrum

items.title: Give Someone a Label and They'll Change Their Own Behavior
